features: New experimental 'Waiting On' feature to see conversations where you're waiting for a response
Improved Demo Mode with guided walkthrough and better visual indicators
Background reply pre-generation for faster response times when switching conversations
Keyboard simulation improvements for the floating window with escape-to-cancel support
fixes: Fixed iMessage overlay appearing after free message limit was reached
Improved app responsiveness by optimizing contacts loading
Fixed crash during onboarding animation on some displays
Fixed various conversation list UI issues
